large-cardamom.nepalHint: Source: Extracted via AI from TEPC/Customs daily unstructured PDF.
large-cardamom.indiaHint: Source: DOM Scrape target → Indian Spices Board (Singtam Hub).
large-cardamom.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
large-cardamom.auHint: Approx. $39–$58 USD/kg. Source: Australian Supermarket & Grocery Retail Data.
large-cardamom.shelfLife: Standard: 6–12 months in dry, ambient conditions
large-cardamom.shelfLifeHint: Export Shelf Life: Up to 24 months (dried to 10% moisture, hermetically sealed). Transit Viability: Easily survives 30-45 day sea freight to US/AU ports.
large-cardamom.opportunityHint: Highest net foreign exchange crop. Drops 12 pts strictly due to reliance on single-country export routes.
large-cardamom.exportValueHint: ~7,000 tonnes exported annually. NPR 7.19 billion ($53M) generated in just the first half year.
large-cardamom.globalCompetitiveness: Large cardamom is Nepal's highest net foreign exchange agricultural crop. The eastern Himalayan microclimate provides a built-in advantage without requiring heavy technological intervention. Vulnerable only to viral blights and over-reliance on single-country transit.
large-cardamom.willBeConsumed: Absolutely. Dried spices are highly liquid on the global commodities market. Demand in the Middle East, South Asia, and expanding US/EU ethnic sectors vastly outstrips supply. Every quality kilogram exported has a guaranteed buyer.

yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.nepalHint: Source: Extracted via AI from TEPC/Customs daily unstructured PDF.
yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.shelfLifeHint: Requires rigorous moisture control and secure airtight packaging.
yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.opportunityHint: Extreme value per gram. Bottlenecked only by sustainable harvesting regulations.
yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.exportValueHint: Massive additional informal trade flows primarily to Tibetan border.
yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.globalCompetitiveness: An unassailable regional monopoly shared with the Tibetan plateau. Synthetic laboratory analogs cannot replicate the perceived potency or cultural prestige of wild-harvested Himalayan fungus.
yarsa-gumba-cordyceps.willBeConsumed: Undeniable. Demand across the Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) demographic continuously pushes against a biologically shrinking and heavily regulated wild supply, enforcing extreme valuations.

dried-ginger-sutho.shelfLifeHint: Requires rigorous moisture control and dry conditions to prevent mold in transit.
dried-ginger-sutho.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
dried-ginger-sutho.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
dried-ginger-sutho.globalCompetitiveness: Nepal is among the top global ginger producers. The organic, fibrous strains grown here are highly potent. The historic barrier to dominating markets has been inadequate local washing and dehydrating infrastructure.
dried-ginger-sutho.willBeConsumed: Extremely high. Ginger is deeply embedded across universal pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and culinary industries. Dehydrated ginger bypasses perishability limits entirely.

himalayan-walnut.nepalHint: Source: Extracted via AI from TEPC/Customs daily unstructured PDF.
himalayan-walnut.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
himalayan-walnut.shelfLifeHint: High oil content means unshelled walnuts can go rancid. Cold storage extends life to 12+ months.
himalayan-walnut.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
himalayan-walnut.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
himalayan-walnut.globalCompetitiveness: Indigenously hard-shelled but bursting with high-fat, rich flavor profiles. They are marketed successfully as rare, wild-foraged superfoods contrasting with genetically homogenized Californian walnuts.
himalayan-walnut.willBeConsumed: High. The global luxury nut and trail-mix market eagerly accepts unhybridized, ancient-strain walnuts, provided shelling and decortication infrastructure meets sanitary export bounds.

star-anise-phool-chakra.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
star-anise-phool-chakra.shelfLifeHint: Whole pods preserve flavor securely. Easily survives extended ocean transit.
star-anise-phool-chakra.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
star-anise-phool-chakra.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
star-anise-phool-chakra.globalCompetitiveness: An essential architectural spice. While facing Chinese production dominance, distinct Nepalese organic certification streams secure specialized, high-margin buyers avoiding heavy agricultural pesticide belts.
star-anise-phool-chakra.willBeConsumed: Solid. Crucial to global culinary phenomena like Vietnamese Pho bases, Chinese five-spice, and Western winter/holiday beverage infusions, guaranteeing permanent demand.

dried-oyster-mushroom.nepalHint: Source: Extracted via AI from TEPC/Customs daily unstructured PDF.
dried-oyster-mushroom.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
dried-oyster-mushroom.shelfLifeHint: High absorbency requires silica gel packs or vacuum packaging during export.
dried-oyster-mushroom.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
dried-oyster-mushroom.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
dried-oyster-mushroom.globalCompetitiveness: Oyster mushrooms dry exceptionally well. Nepal's altitude and relative isolation provide virtually pest-free growth environments, drastically minimizing the need for fungicides.
dried-oyster-mushroom.willBeConsumed: High. The global pivot towards plant-based diets utilizes rehydrated oyster mushrooms extensively as a high-protein, umami-rich meat substitute in modern restaurant chains.

hill-black-pepper.nepalHint: Source: Extracted via AI from TEPC/Customs daily unstructured PDF.
hill-black-pepper.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
hill-black-pepper.shelfLifeHint: Whole peppercorns retain viability for years in dry, ambient conditions.
hill-black-pepper.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
hill-black-pepper.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
hill-black-pepper.globalCompetitiveness: Mountain-grown pepper variants mature slower, creating smaller but wildly concentrated peppercorns. This piperine density allows brands to charge exotic markups over standard Vietnamese bulk pepper.
hill-black-pepper.willBeConsumed: Absolute. Black pepper is the undisputed king of global spices. Every civilization across the planet consumes it daily, ensuring limitless market depth.

lapsi-titaura-candy.nepalHint: Source: Extracted via AI from TEPC/Customs daily unstructured PDF.
lapsi-titaura-candy.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
lapsi-titaura-candy.shelfLifeHint: Sugar and salt act as natural preservatives, but it hardens or spoils after a year.
lapsi-titaura-candy.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
lapsi-titaura-candy.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
lapsi-titaura-candy.globalCompetitiveness: An entirely exclusive Nepali endemic export. The complex sour-spicy-sweet profile of the Nepalese Hog Plum holds zero global equivalents, operating with a complete cultural monopoly.
lapsi-titaura-candy.willBeConsumed: Intensely by the diaspora. To achieve mainstream crossover, production must pivot from traditional pulp sheets into precisely portioned, FDA-compliant gummy/chew sectors.

sesame-seeds-til.shelfLifeHint: High oil content means seeds can go rancid. Refrigeration extends life.
sesame-seeds-til.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
sesame-seeds-til.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
sesame-seeds-til.globalCompetitiveness: Though competing against massive African bulk exports, the Nepalese black and golden mountain strains provide distinct aesthetic and nutritional profiles sought extensively by high-end Japanese and Korean importers.
sesame-seeds-til.willBeConsumed: Voluminous. Pushed globally by the soaring popularity of Tahini, Asian sauces, and healthy bakery garnishes, keeping wholesale ledgers aggressively cleared.

cinnamon-bark-oil.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
cinnamon-bark-oil.shelfLifeHint: Bark and essential oil are highly stable and naturally antimicrobial.
cinnamon-bark-oil.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
cinnamon-bark-oil.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
cinnamon-bark-oil.globalCompetitiveness: Nepalese Cinnamomum tamala derivatives face steep competition from true Ceylon cinnamon but maintain a cost-effective, high-yield niche in industrial flavoring markets.
cinnamon-bark-oil.willBeConsumed: Persistent. Used extensively in global dental care products, oral flavorings, and holistic antimicrobial therapies, ensuring constant underlying industrial demand.

gundruk-fermented-greens.usaHint: Source: Auto-synchronized via International Trade API (World Bank mock).
gundruk-fermented-greens.shelfLifeHint: Sun-dried fermented leaves. Highly resilient to spoilage unless exposed to ambient moisture.
gundruk-fermented-greens.opportunityHint: Strong export potential if direct supply chains can bypass middle-men hurdles.
gundruk-fermented-greens.exportValueHint: Value represents current official channels. Optimization can double yields.
gundruk-fermented-greens.globalCompetitiveness: Currently heavily restricted to the Nepalese diaspora. To unlock global scale, it requires transitioning from cultural nostalgia into the mainstream 'probiotic superfood' narrative.
gundruk-fermented-greens.willBeConsumed: Steadily. The diaspora consumes current supply pipelines fully, but breaking into the Western health-food market relies on strategic packaging and microbiological lab certifications.
